title: 3Powers role bindings (roles.yaml)
description: Binds each lifecycle role to an agent-backend integration and (optionally) a pinned model. Roles are bound to model families for the diversity check; diversity is recommended, not forced.

diversity_enforced.description: Whether the diversity recommendation is surfaced.

diversity_level.description: How 'diverse enough' is judged: family (different model families) or model (a different model in one family qualifies).

headless_integrations.description: Agent-backend CLIs a live `3pwr run` may dispatch headlessly.

roles.description: Role name (planner, coder, oracle, reviewer) -> its binding.

model_family.description: Model family for the diversity check (wins over id-derivation).

model.description: Full model id pin (needed for model-level diversity).

integration.description: Agent backend the role is dispatched to (a manifest under .3powers/agents/).

require_dispatch.description: oracle only: require an isolated headless oracle dispatch attestation at High-risk (default false).

subagent_models.description: Optional per-stage sub-agent model overrides (step -> model id). Unset changes nothing.
